---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# how2

The goal of how2 is to help me remember how to do things.

* [bash](bash/bash.md)
* [git](git/git.md)
